object_a.label: tv
object_a.description: flat-screen TV mounted on right wall above mantel
object_a.long_form_open_description: A black flat-panel television mounted on the wall to the right of the living area, positioned above or beside the fireplace mantel. Screen is off or dark causing a rectangular dark patch visible on the wall.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Mounted on the wall directly above or adjacent to the fireplace mantel and near the right window
